message:
fix(status): prevent generic > pattern from matching agent-specific prompts

- Fix starship prompt pattern to match paths like "~/project ❯"
- Update generic > pattern to match "word>" format for cross-agent fallback
- Add knownAgentPromptPrefixes regex to detect agent-specific prompts
- Skip generic > pattern when line matches claude>/codex>/etc and agentType is empty

This fixes TestIsPromptLine and TestIsIdlePrompt failures where:
- Starship prompts with paths weren't detected for user panes
- Generic > pattern incorrectly matched agent prompts without proper agentType

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
